prompt: Realign the cervical spine in the source image to match the curvature seen in the reference.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, a lateral X-ray, by realigning the cervical spine. Adjust its curvature to precisely match the curvature indicated by the green line in reference image 2. The edited output should maintain the photorealistic X-ray style.
objects: Lateral X-ray view of a human head and neck

Soft tissues of the neck and upper chest
